title: Mutation Trigger Condition
description: Schema canonical per trigger_conditions in mutation_catalog.yaml. Whitelist 12 kinds (ADR-2026-05-10 + Phase 6 TKT-C4 2026-05-11). Evaluator runtime: apps/backend/services/combat/mutationTriggerEvaluator.js.

kind.description: Trigger kind whitelist canonical. 12 entries post Phase 6 closure.

threshold.description: Generic numeric threshold. Most kinds use this as cumulative counter target.

count.description: Alternative numeric threshold for kinds with discrete event counting.

window.description: Counter scoping window. cumulative = cross-session (Prisma persistence required).

source_trait.description: Optional trait id filter for status_apply_count source.

biome_class.description: Biome class identifier for biome_turn_count + cumulative_turns_biome kinds. Use 'any' to disable filter.

sistema_pressure_min.description: Minimum Sistema pressure required for biome_turn_count.

mos_threshold.description: Margin of Success threshold for damage_taken_high_mos.

prereq_mutation_id.description: Required prerequisite mutation id for mutation_chain kind.

species_filter.description: Species filter for ally_killed_adjacent + ally_adjacent_turns. 'same' = ally.species == unit.species.

signal_id.description: Sistema warning signal id for sistema_signal_active.

trait_id.description: Trait id filter for trait_active_cumulative kind. Counts cumulative fires of this trait.

_phase_6_residue_closed.ally_adjacent_turns: Counts cumulative rounds where unit had any ally within Manhattan distance <=1. State: unit.cumulative_ally_adjacent_turns (int per-unit, cross-session Prisma persistent). Update: end-of-round bridge hook scans session.units for adjacent ally + increments if found. Optional species_filter narrows ally pool.
_phase_6_residue_closed.trait_active_cumulative: Counts cumulative fires of a specific trait per unit cross-session. State: unit.cumulative_trait_active (JSON {trait_id: count} per-unit, Prisma persistent). Update: end-of-round bridge hook reads session.events for action_type='trait_fire' actor_id=unit.id + increments per-trait counter.
